channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: BYD Introduces New Performance Model for Shark 6 with Hybrid Powertrain
item.description: BYD has launched a new Performance variant of its Shark 6 model, featuring the DMO Super Hybrid system that combines a 2.0l turbocharged petrol engine with front and rear electric motors. This setup d...

item.title: John Carpenter's Reflections on Society Through His Films
item.description: The article explores John Carpenter's cinematic works and his critical views on societal structures, particularly focusing on themes of class struggle, consumerism, and inequality. Carpenter's films s...

item.title: India Honors Excellence at 72nd National Film Awards
item.description: The 72nd National Film Awards, presented by the Government of India, celebrated outstanding achievements in Indian cinema. The ceremony recognized excellence across various categories, including Best ...

item.title: Ghana Jails Opposition Leader for Illegal Mining Conviction
item.description: Bernard Antwi Boasiako, known as Chairman Wontumi, has been sentenced to 20 years in prison for illegal mining activities, marking a significant political conviction in Ghana. The Accra High Court con...

item.title: Iran and the U.S. Escalate Full-Scale Warfare Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: The article details escalating military conflict between Iran and the United States, with both nations launching strikes across multiple regions. Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian declared 'full-sca...

item.title: Flock Safety CEO Addresses AI, Surveillance, and Privacy Debates at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.description: The article discusses Garrett Langley, CEO of Flock Safety, who will address the intersection of AI, surveillance, and privacy at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Flock Safety, a company specializing in surve...

item.title: Senator Padilla Urges Transparency in Bank Records
item.description: Senator Robin Padilla has called on his fellow senators to disclose their bank records, sparking discussions about transparency in government finances. The challenge comes amid ongoing debates about a...

item.title: Taylor Farms Cleared in Parasite Outbreak Amid Skepticism Over FDA Findings
item.description: A California-based farm, Taylor Farms, claims the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) apologized for initially linking it to a Cyclospora parasite outbreak that caused explosive diarrhea in thousands. ...

item.title: Kogi Governor Ododo Commends Security Forces for Rescuing Abducted NECO Candidates, Reaffirms No-Ransom Policy
item.description: Ahmed Usman Ododo, Kogi State governor, has reiterated his administration’s strict no-ransom policy after security forces successfully rescued four NECO candidates kidnapped from an examination centre...

item.title: Nairobi Businesswoman Reinvests Earnings to Build KSh 2M Stock Portfolio
item.description: Wambui Khamasi, a Nairobi-based entrepreneur, shared her journey of growing a motorcycle spare parts business by forgoing her salary for nearly a year. Starting with just KSh 86,000 and minimal invent...

item.title: Congolese Boxer's Death Attributed to Fire, Not Xenophobia, Says Manager
item.description: The death of Congolese cruiserweight boxer Roméo Katompa, who died in a fire at his rented apartment in Johannesburg, has been officially ruled out as xenophobic violence by his manager, Raymond Kupul...

item.title: Key Tech and Retail Stocks Face Market Volatility
item.description: The stock market experienced heightened volatility as investors closely monitored several key companies, including Alibaba, Ryanair, AMC Entertainment, and Micron Technology. Alibaba, a major player i...

item.title: NTA addresses fabricated OMR sheets in NEET-UG 2026, warns of legal consequences
item.description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified that images of answer sheets from the NEET-UG 2026 exam, widely shared on social media, were digitally fabricated. The agency examined allegations from ...

item.title: Polygamy Scandal Threatens GOP Candidate's Primary Victory
item.description: Congressman Andy Biggs, a leading GOP candidate in Arizona's Republican gubernatorial primary, faces renewed scrutiny over a decade-old polygamy scandal involving the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Ch...

item.title: Prince Harry's Analysis of England's World Cup Loss to Argentina
item.description: Prince Harry has offered his perspective on England's disappointing defeat to Argentina in the World Cup final, highlighting what he believes went wrong. The article details his comments on the team's...

item.title: Senate subpoenas bank records to investigate Sara Duterte's unexplained wealth
item.description: The Senate impeachment court has authorized subpoenas for bank and tax records of Vice President Sara Duterte and her husband, lawyer Manases Carpio. Former congressman Oscar Moreno, who prosecuted fo...

item.title: Art Exhibition Explores Transatlantic Journey from Impressionism to Abstract Expressionism
item.description: A major exhibition at the Art Gallery of South Australia showcases 57 key works from the Toledo Museum of Art's collection, spanning innovation and social change in modern art from the 1870s to 1970s....

item.title: South Africa Clarifies Immigration Challenges Aren't Xenophobia
item.description: The article discusses South Africa's immigration challenges and clarifies that these issues should not be interpreted as xenophobia. High Commissioner Ms Noluthando Mayende-Malepe emphasized that ille...

item.title: Senate Subpoenas Financial Records of Companies Linked to Sara Duterte and Mans Carpio
item.description: The Senate impeachment court has ordered the subpoena of financial records for at least 20 companies linked to Vice President Sara Duterte and her husband, Mans Carpio. These records, including bank a...

item.title: Hamas Elects Khalil al-Hayya as New Political Bureau Chief
item.description: Hamas has officially announced the election of Khalil al-Hayya as the new head of its political bureau, succeeding the late leader Yahya al-Sinwar. Al-Hayya, a seasoned negotiator in indirect ceasefir...
